biz.name: typeeee
biz.tagline: A boutique dental clinic where cutting-edge technology meets a calm, welcoming environment. Because great dental care should feel like self-care.

services.title: Aesthetic Dentistry
services.desc: Veneers, whitening, and smile design crafted to complement your natural beauty.

services.title: Dental Implants
services.desc: Titanium implants that feel and look completely natural. Lifetime results.

services.title: Orthodontics
services.desc: Invisible aligners and clear braces — straighten your smile discreetly.

services.title: Root Canal
services.desc: Painless, precise endodontic treatment with full digital guidance.

testimonials.quote: I've never felt so comfortable at a dentist. The clinic feels like a spa — the team is warm, professional and incredibly skilled.
testimonials.name: Noa Levi

testimonials.quote: My implants look completely natural. Six months later I still can't believe how painless the whole process was.
testimonials.name: Avi Cohen

testimonials.quote: My kids actually look forward to their appointments here. That says everything you need to know.
testimonials.name: Miri Shapiro
